sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109321" key="u(pota/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποτάκ-της</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n109321.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who brings into subjection,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὦ τῶν ὑπερεχόντων ἐπιτάκται </foreign>(<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑποτάκται</foreign> cj. Dieterich recte): <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὦ τῶν ὑποτεταγμένων ὑψωταί</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PMag.Leid. V.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
